doc: Semver of the SOFTWARE that produces a translation, orthogonal to the Claude model version (provenance.model_version) and to the project CHANGELOG release. Bump by re-run impact: MAJOR = rows below MUST be re-translated; MINOR = re-run recommended; PATCH = no re-run needed. After a bump, run `python pipeline_version.py freeze` to record the new content SHA. `min_valid` is the re-run threshold: any stamped version < min_valid is stale.

script.note: deterministic mask / harvest / restore / corpus-gate + card promotion
